jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Haldiram's
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
